summary.key_theme: Apple 在 AI 領域的潛力與市場份額增長與潛在的財報壓力及勞資糾紛並存。

bullish.title: 2.5 Billion Reasons Apple Might Be the Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy Today
bullish.reason: 強調 Apple 在 AI 領域的潛在價值，認為市場低估了其競爭力，有助於提升投資人信心。

bullish.title: TSMC posts 35% jump in revenue to new record high as AI chip demand stays strong
bullish.reason: 台積電營收創新高且明確指出 Apple 為其關鍵客戶，間接證實 Apple 產品需求強勁。

bullish.title: Apple Gaining Market Share In PCs, Smartphones
bullish.reason: 報導指出 MacBook Neo 與 iPhone 17 帶動市占率提升，顯示產品競爭力依然穩固。

bullish.title: Apple TV Lands On Amazon Prime Video In US Streaming Tie-Up
bullish.reason: 與 Amazon 合作擴大 Apple TV 訂閱服務的通路，有助於提升服務部門營收。

bullish.title: Warren Buffett and Ken Fisher Love Apple (AAPL) – Here’s Why
bullish.reason: 知名投資人如 Warren Buffett 與 Ken Fisher 持續看好，提供長期投資價值背書。

bullish.title: Trade Tracker: Kevin Simpson trims Marathon Petroleum and buys more Apple and Microsoft
bullish.reason: 機構投資人加碼 Apple，顯示專業投資組合對其後市持正面看法。

bullish.title: How Apple Can Win Back Gen-Z With Neo
bullish.reason: 透過 TikTok 行銷策略吸引年輕族群，有助於維持品牌長期影響力。

bullish.title: Apple Hires Uber’s Asia-Pacific Government Relations Chief
bullish.reason: 延攬 Uber 前高層強化亞太地區政府關係，有助於應對複雜的監管環境。

bearish.title: Apple set to deliver slight earnings miss for March quarter on weaker iPhone sales, higher memory costs
bearish.reason: 預期 iPhone 銷售疲軟及記憶體成本上升導致財報可能不如預期，直接衝擊短期股價。

bearish.title: The Apple Paradox: Shuttering Its First Unionized US Store In Towson
bearish.reason: 關閉首家工會化門市引發勞工反彈，可能損害企業形象並引發後續法律或公關風險。

bearish.title: Apple faces challenges amid geopolitical strife, says Deepwater's Gene Munster
bearish.reason: 地緣政治緊張局勢對供應鏈與銷售構成潛在威脅，增加營運不確定性。

bearish.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL): Israel Englander Trims Stake
bearish.reason: 大型避險基金減持股份，可能引發市場對短期獲利了結的擔憂。

bearish.title: Does Cirrus Logic's (CRUS) Apple Design Win Quietly Reframe Its Customer Concentration Narrative?
bearish.reason: 分析供應鏈廠商的客戶集中度風險，間接反映 Apple 供應鏈管理的複雜性。

bearish.title: Final Trade: AAPL, BABA, MPC
bearish.reason: 交易員在節目中討論 AAPL，但未給予明確買進建議，市場情緒相對平淡。

neutral.title: Apple, Levi’s, and 5 More Stocks Get Analyst Attention
neutral.reason: 僅為分析師報告的彙整，未提供具體評級調整，對股價影響有限。
